scenarios.name: ❌ Missing EmailService Section
scenarios.expectedError: InvalidOperationException: EmailService configuration section is missing in appsettings.json. Please add the 'EmailService' section with required properties: Provider, FromEmail, FromName, HeaderImage

scenarios.name: ❌ Missing FromEmail
scenarios.description: EmailService section exists but FromEmail is missing
scenarios.expectedError:
InvalidOperationException: EmailService configuration is incomplete:
  - EmailService.FromEmail is required

scenarios.name: ❌ Multiple Missing Fields
scenarios.description: EmailService section exists but multiple fields are missing
scenarios.expectedError:
InvalidOperationException: EmailService configuration is incomplete:
  - EmailService.FromEmail is required
  - EmailService.FromName is required
  - EmailService.HeaderImage is required

scenarios.name: ❌ Missing Infobip Section
scenarios.description: Provider is set to Infobip but Infobip section is missing
scenarios.expectedError: InvalidOperationException: Infobip configuration section is missing in appsettings.json. Since EmailService.Provider is set to 'Infobip', the 'Infobip' section is required with properties: BasePath, ApiKey

scenarios.name: ❌ Missing Infobip ApiKey
scenarios.description: Infobip section exists but ApiKey is missing
scenarios.expectedError:
InvalidOperationException: Infobip configuration is incomplete:
  - Infobip.ApiKey is required

scenarios.name: ❌ Missing Infobip BasePath and ApiKey
scenarios.description: Infobip section exists but both required fields are missing
scenarios.expectedError:
InvalidOperationException: Infobip configuration is incomplete:
  - Infobip.BasePath is required
  - Infobip.ApiKey is required

scenarios.name: ❌ Unknown Provider
scenarios.description: Provider is set to an unsupported value
scenarios.expectedError: InvalidOperationException: Unknown email provider 'Gmail'. Supported providers: Infobip

environmentVariableExamples.name: ✅ Hybrid Configuration
environmentVariableExamples.description: appsettings.json for non-secrets, environment variables for secrets
